reviews.comment:
La atención en el despacho de Combustible no es buena y encima los que están de Seguridad privada no te dejan estacionar en la Playa x si querés ir al baño o tomarte un café,  siendo que hay lugar para estacionar , pero ponen conitos para que te vallas .

(Translated by Google)
The service at the gas station is not good, and on top of that, the private security guards won't let you park on the beach if you want to go to the bathroom or get a coffee, even though there's parking available. They put up cones to make you leave.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5256422588388150484/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUMteXNHekpnEAE

reviews.comment:
Realmente experiencia de 5 puntos. Hay poca gente para la cantidad de autos q van por lo cual hay mucha espera y bastante burocrático. La persona q me atendió bien igual solo cambie una luz baja q se me había quemado

(Translated by Google)
Overall, a 5-star experience. There aren't enough staff for the number of cars, so there's a long wait and it's quite bureaucratic. The person who helped me was fine, though; I only had a low beam headlight replaced because it had burned out.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5256422588388150484/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUMtNU8yTk5REAE
